characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, light complexion. He has dark, wavy, shoulder-length hair and a clean-shaven face with expressive features.
characters.wardrobe: He primarily wears a plain black crew-neck sweater, but briefly appears in a black short-sleeved t-shirt.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, expressive, and engaging, often using hand gestures.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझसे अक्सर लोग पूछते हैं कि English बोलने में confidence कैसे लाएं? सच बताऊँ तो आज के time में AI का सही use करना ही best तरीका है। [People often ask me how to get confidence in speaking English? To be honest, in today's time, using AI correctly is the best way.]
Character A says: जब मैंने अपनी पहली corporate job start की थी, तो सबसे अच्छी चीज़ जो हुई वो ये थी कि मेरे colleagues ने मेरी English की बहुत गलतियां निकालीं। [When I started my first corporate job, the best thing that happened was that my colleagues pointed out a lot of mistakes in my English.]
Character A says: जैसे 'Resume' को मैं 'रेज़्यूम' बोलता था। तो मेरे साथ वाली कलीग ने बोला, 'It's not re-zume, it's re-zu-may!' पूरा दिन वो लोग मेरी English correct करते थे। [Like I used to pronounce 'Resume' as 're-zume'. So my colleague sitting next to me said, 'It's not re-zume, it's re-zu-may!' They used to correct my English all day.]
Character A says: ऐसे ही तो बच्चे भाषा सीखते हैं ना? जब कोई बिना judge किए आपकी गलतियां सुधारे, तो आप जल्दी सीखते हो। [This is exactly how children learn a language, right? When someone corrects your mistakes without judging, you learn faster.]
Character A says: लेकिन हमारे tier-2 cities या घरों में वो English वाला environment नहीं मिल पाता... पर आज के time में, AI ये काम आसानी से कर सकता है। [But in our tier-2 cities or homes, we don't get that English environment... but in today's time, AI can do this easily.]
Character A says: इसके लिए मेरा personal recommendation है Supernova. [For this, my personal recommendation is Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable problem (lacking English confidence).
- Shares a personal anecdote about being corrected by colleagues, normalizing making mistakes.
- Introduces the core problem (lack of an English-speaking environment) and positions Supernova as the AI solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English बोलने में confidence कैसे लाएं? (How to get confidence in speaking English?)
आज के time में (In today's time)
AI का सही use (Right use of AI)
Corporate job के दिनों में (During corporate job days)
Colleagues ने (Colleagues)
मेरी English की (My English's)
गलतियां निकालीं😂 (Pointed out mistakes)
जैसे 'Resume' (Like 'Resume')
मैं बोलता था 'रेज़्यूम' (I used to say 're-zume')
It's not re-zume!
It's re-zu-may!
ऐसे ही बच्चे सीखते हैं (This is how kids learn)
बिना judge किए (Without judging)
Tier-2 cities में (In tier-2 cities)
English environment नहीं मिलता (Don't get English environment)
AI ये काम कर सकता है (AI can do this work)
Supernova

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Supernova में AI tutor है जो language सिखाने में एकदम best है। आप किसी भी situation के लिए English practice कर सकते हो, और ये AI बिना थके आपको बड़े प्यार से सिखाता है। [Supernova has an AI tutor which is absolutely the best at teaching languages. You can practice English for any situation, and this AI teaches you very lovingly without getting tired.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the AI tutor's capability to teach patiently across various real-world situations.
- Emphasizes a judgment-free, encouraging learning experience.
- Strips out competitor's specific pricing claims to align with Supernova's premium positioning.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova के साथ (With Supernova)
AI Tutor (AI Tutor)
किसी भी situation के लिए (For any situation)
बिना थके (Without getting tired)
प्यार से सिखाए (Teaches lovingly)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: जैसे जब मुझे client meetings में business English बोलनी होती थी, तो सच कहूँ, मुझे बहुत घबराहट होती थी। [Like when I had to speak business English in client meetings, to be honest, I used to get very nervous.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Connects with the target audience's professional struggles (nervousness in client meetings instead of Wall Street).
- Builds empathy and relatability with the working professional demographic.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Client meetings में (In client meetings)
Business English बोलने में (In speaking Business English)
घबराहट होती थी, सच कहूँ तो😅 (Used to get nervous, to be honest)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: पर Supernova के साथ, आप AI tutor के साथ एकदम real-life roleplay कर सकते हो, या फिर daily lessons से step-by-step सीख सकते हो। [But with Supernova, you can do real-life roleplay with the AI tutor, or learn step-by-step from daily lessons.]
Character A says: मतलब, अपने घर बैठे-बैठे आप job interview क्रैक करने से लेकर clients से बात करने तक की practice कर सकते हो। [Meaning, sitting at home, you can practice everything from cracking a job interview to talking to clients.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's core features: roleplay and daily lessons.
- Shows the practical payoff: practicing for interviews and client calls from the comfort of home.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova के साथ (With Supernova)
AI Tutor के साथ (With AI Tutor)
Real-life roleplay (Real-life roleplay)
Daily lessons (Daily lessons)
घर बैठे practice (Practice sitting at home)
Job interview से लेकर (From job interview)
Clients से बात करने तक✌️ (To talking to clients)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: तो जब हम AI के ज़माने में जी रहे हैं, तो इस technology का फायदा उठाओ। अपनी English improve करो और अपने career को एक नई उड़ान दो! [So when we are living in the era of AI, take advantage of this technology. Improve your English and give a new flight to your career!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers an encouraging, older-sibling style call to action.
- Motivates the user to leverage AI for tangible career growth.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
AI के ज़माने में (In the era of AI)
Technology का फायदा उठाओ (Take advantage of technology)
English improve करो (Improve English)
Career को नई उड़ान दो🔥 (Give a new flight to your career)
